title: Daydream Tools
description: A Modular texture pack with several skins for tools. Also have Pink Diamond and Netherite!
body:
_This is a modular texture collection for those who see their gear not just as utilities, but as an extension of their world's story. It's not one imposed vision—it's a palette. Craft your own aesthetic from fragments of different dreams._ ### **What's Inside the Dream?** **All Buckets** — empty, with liquids, with mobs, with powdered snow. **Core Tools** — Diamond & Netherite Pickaxe, Sword, Axe, Shovel, Hoe. **Additional Tools** — Bow, Fishing Rod, Shears. ◈ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ◈ ### **How It Works:** This is a **modular pack**. You can choose one thing or combine several and layer them to create something truly unique. **Compatibility:** All modules work on Minecraft versions 1.21. _and 1.20._ ### **How to choose skins:** Different color schemes or textures are provided for the same items (except buckets). You can select them by downloading the file you need, following these names: **(Optional)** `• buckets` — A standalone pack for redesigned buckets. Install this if you only want new buckets. **Choose Your Diamond:** _Each Diamond pack includes **all** core Diamond tools + the additional tools (Bow, Rod, Shears)._ `• Daydream_nd` — **Normal Diamond.** Classic, clear, celestial blue. `• Daydream_pd` — **Pink Diamond.** Elegant and... pink. `• Daydream_cnd` — **Cherry Normal Diamond.** Sakura petals on classic blue. `• Daydream_cpd` — **Cherry Pink Diamond.** Sakura petals on soft pink. **Choose Your Netherite:** _Each Netherite pack includes **only** the Netherite tools._ `• Daydream_nn` — **Normal Netherite.** Classic color, new shape. `• Daydream_pn` — **Pink Netherite.** Same texture as for diamond one. `• Daydream_hn` — **Heaven Netherite.** Pearlescent, ethereal.   **Each skin-pack has a unique icon** for easy identification in the menu. ◈ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ◈

Your adventure is your own. May your tools be too.

◈ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ◈

=========================
